title: ClientCrasher
description: A new, better way to punish cheaters.
body:
# Client Crasher

Do you have problems with cheaters, but you don't want to just BAN them?
This plugin is for you! With this plugin you can now blow their game up.

## Features:
 - (kick but better) Crashing player's game
 - (ban but better) Adding nickname/uuid to the auto-crash list - crash them as soon as they join!
## API:
Just use this method:
```java
ClientCrasher.crashPlayer(player)
```
## How it works:
It literally blows the client up.
